word: G1907 - ἐπέχω - epéchō - ep-ekh'-o - Give heed unto

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Give heed unto
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
2. to hold toward, hold forth, present
3. to check to delay, stop, stay

ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G1909 and G2192; to hold upon, that is, (by implication) to retain; (by extension) to detain; (with implication of G3563) to pay attention to: - give (take) heed unto, hold forth, mark, stay.
